summary: Planned one conservative non-mutating action per open PR in live inventory shard 101. Four PRs remain independent for normal maintainer review, and #93038 is routed to central security handling because the hydrated review describes a live workflow boundary with credential-bearing environment values.

actions.reason: Keep as an independent open PR for normal maintainer review; it is useful contributor work and not part of a dedupe/closure cluster.
Route the exact PR to central OpenClaw security handling because the hydrated review raises a live workflow boundary involving credential-bearing environment values.
Keep as an independent docs PR for normal maintainer review; closure is not supported by the hydrated evidence.
Keep as an independent compatibility-risk PR; it is not duplicate, superseded, or low-signal based on the hydrated artifact.
Keep as an independent open PR; the failed Real behavior proof and compatibility-risk label require ordinary maintainer/author follow-up rather than Clownfish closure.
